sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29496" key="dussu/mbatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσσύμ-βᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ill-agreeing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς τὸ ἀλλόφυλον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.661c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
